text.title: BA Governance Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Apply the decision tree in `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Verify preconditions hold; pre-filter via Skip-If.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: gather-typed-inputs
step.action: Collect each prerequisite with declared type and source citation. Reject untyped/unsourced inputs.
step.decision-gate: If any required input missing, STOP and request from named owner.

step.name: draft-decision-record
step.action: Draft the decision-record per the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml`, applying each rule from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: validate-output
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to step 3 and fix violations.

step.name: register-and-review
step.action: Commit the artefact to its canonical location; set `owner`, `last_reviewed`, and version. Notify named consumers.
step.output: Registered artefact live in the repo
